projects.name: Web3D
projects.description: An innovative web application showcasing modern design and functionality

pages.message: Load models, run simulations, place them on maps, and share instantly—no installs, no heavy software, just smooth real-time interaction.
From simple assets to complex designs, import any model and instantly explore, interact, and build on top of it without friction.
Attach info, videos, links, or live data to precise points in your scene—turning static models into rich, interactive experiences.
Switch between day and night, add rain, snow, fog, or storms, and fine-tune every environmental detail in real time.
Adjust sun position, intensity, shadows, and individual model lighting to achieve the exact mood, realism, and visual clarity you need.
Create smooth motion, layered animations, and large-scale simulations like traffic or crowds—optimized for performance using instancing.
Place models using real coordinates, visualize GeoJSON data, and build location-aware scenes with terrain and map integrations.
Walk through scenes, inspect details, or use cinematic camera modes to automatically showcase your environment with smooth motion.
Your entire 3D scene is just a link away—open, explore, and interact on any device exactly as it was designed.

projects.name: 360Viewer
projects.description: A creative digital experience with immersive visuals and interactions

pages.message: Capture real-world scenes and turn them into interactive 360 experiences—organized, mapped, and ready to explore from anywhere.

pages.header: From Camera to Platform in Seconds
pages.message: Import 360 images directly from your workflow and start working instantly—no complex transfers, no scattered files, just everything in one place.

pages.header: Add Context Exactly Where It Matters
pages.message: Place hotspots inside 360 scenes with info, videos, or links—making every location clear, detailed, and easy to understand.
Link multiple 360 images together to create guided walkthroughs—navigate spaces naturally as if you were actually there.

pages.header: Every Scene Placed on the Map
pages.message: Auto-link images with latitude and longitude, visualize them on maps, and navigate projects spatially with full geographic context.
Manage images, scenes, and related data from a single place—structured, searchable, and always accessible when needed.
Assign roles across projects and control access with precision—ensuring the right people see the right data at the right time.
Bridge the gap between field capture and analysis—reduce back-and-forth and make every update instantly visible.
Turn your 360 projects into shareable links—explore, navigate, and review from any device without extra tools.

projects.name: DIM DOCKS
projects.description: A comprehensive platform for managing users, services, and access across your software ecosystem

pages.header: All Your Apps. One Login. Full Control.
pages.message: Manage users, roles, and subscriptions across every service from a single platform—built to stay organized as your system grows.

pages.header: One Login Across Everything You Use
pages.message: Sign in once and move across all connected services instantly—no repeated logins, no friction, just a smooth, unified experience.

pages.header: All Your Services, Finally in Sync
pages.message: Connect and manage multiple applications in one system—control access, plans, and usage without switching between tools.

pages.header: Organized by Teams, Projects, and Workflows
pages.message: Structure everything the way teams actually operate—organizations, projects, services, and users, all clearly connected and easy to manage.
Create custom roles across services and projects, ensuring every user gets exactly the right level of access—clean and controlled.

pages.header: Control at Every Level, From One Dashboard
pages.message: Manage organizations, projects, users, and subscriptions with full visibility—whether at team level or across the entire system.

pages.header: Onboard and Launch Services Without the Chaos
pages.message: Bring new services live with structured setup, dynamic configurations, and managed deployments—all handled smoothly in one place.
Add users in bulk, assign roles instantly, and manage access across projects and services while keeping everything structured.
Fully responsive and WCAG-friendly—access your system from any device, ensuring smooth control and usability for every user.

projects.name: PASSAD
projects.description: A comprehensive access control platform for managing entry across multiple properties and facilities

pages.header: Control Access to Every Space, Instantly
pages.message: Manage who enters where and when across buildings, rooms, and facilities—using digital keyrings, real-time control, and zero friction.

pages.header: Access That Adapts to Every Situation
pages.message: Grant permanent or time-based access for residents, guests, or workers—precise control without manual tracking or confusion.

pages.header: All Your Properties, One Control System
pages.message: Manage access across hotels, societies, offices, or sites—keep every building, floor, and room connected and under control.
Issue and manage RFID cards or keyrings with full control—activate, update, or revoke access instantly from anywhere.
From admins to on-ground staff, every role has defined control—ensuring secure access management without overlap or risk.

pages.header: Control More Than Just Entry Points
pages.message: Manage InfoScreens across locations—display announcements, videos, or live updates directly within your buildings.
Powered by a modern architecture with role-based security and SSO—built to handle complex systems without compromise.

projects.name: SMART SEVAK
projects.description: A smart shop management platform with WhatsApp-based ordering for local businesses

pages.header: Run Your Shop from One Smart App
pages.message: Manage orders, pricing, and daily operations from one place—while customers order instantly on WhatsApp, just like they already do.
Handle orders, update prices, manage inventory, and track payments—designed for fast-moving local businesses and growing shops.

pages.header: Let Customers Order the Easy Way
pages.message: Customers scan a QR or tap a link to order on WhatsApp—no new apps, no confusion, just a simple and familiar experience.
Convert WhatsApp messages into structured orders—accept, reject, or reply directly without juggling multiple chats.
See what customers order, when they return, and what works best—so you can grow smarter without guesswork.
Send reminders, updates, and offers on WhatsApp—keeping your shop active and top of mind every day.

projects.name: LIVE SLIDER
projects.description: A lightweight mobile wallpaper app with gyro-based parallax motion and smart battery optimization

pages.message: Turn static images into smooth, responsive wallpapers that move with your phone—lightweight, fluid, and built to feel natural.
Your wallpaper responds to every movement using gyro-based parallax—creating depth and motion that feels real, not forced.

pages.header: Built to Save Battery, Not Drain It
pages.message: Optimized to run light, match device performance, and even switch to static mode on low battery—so you never have to worry.
Use a single image or create a slideshow that changes on double tap—keeping your screen fresh without extra effort.
Choose from multiple rotation modes that control how your wallpaper moves—whether fixed, directional, or fully dynamic.
Barely 3MB, runs locally with no login or tracking—just smooth performance, full privacy, and support across devices.
